objectives.text: Find and kill Rathbreaker
Portal back to camp, enter caravan
notes: Can also go ESC > Respawn at Checkpoint

objectives.text: Speak to everyone, use desert map to go to Mawdun Quarry
Find exit to Mawdun Mine
Find and kill Rudja
Talk to Risu, portal back to town
Talk to Risu, then use desert map to go to Halani Gates
Talk to Asala at the gates, go back to caravan, talk to Risu again, then to Asala again
Use desert map to go to Traitor's Passage
Find and kill Basala, pick up the Djinn Barya quest item
notes: If you find paper on the walls, you are close

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Halani Gates
notes: Stairs up means you are on the right way

objectives.text: Find and loot the Bell Chest
notes: Dead end with checkpoint, monsters, and dropped gold

objectives.text: Find and kill Jamanra the Risen King
notes: Always keep close to canyon. Cross canyon three times to find boss.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs and to the bottom right (or left) of the zone, then back to town
Speak to Zarka and turn in her quest
Use the desert map to go to the Trial of Sekhemas
notes: Take waypoint, then go back to town. Do trial whenever ready.

objectives.text: Talk to everyone, then use desert map to go to Keth
Kill Kabala, the Constrictor Queen
notes: Somewhat in the middle of the zone

objectives.text: Kill snake monsters until you find the Kabala Clan Relic
notes: Can also drop in the Lost City

objectives.text: Find exit to the Lost City
notes: Always bottom right of zone, after big bridge. Take checkpoint, do rest if not yet done.

objectives.text: Go to the Lost City
Find exit and go to the Buried Shrines
Find the Golden Tomb
Find the Ninth Treasure of Keth (big gilded beetle)
Find the Heart of Keth
Find and loot the guarded sarcophagus
Find and complete the Elemental Offering Event
Kill Azarian the Forsaken Son
Talk to the goddess, loot the cinders, burn the goddess, loot the Essence of Water
Talk to Zarka
Use desert map to go to Mastodon Badlands
Find the exit to the Bone Pits
Find the Lightless Passage to unlock the Well of Souls
Kill hyena enemies until you find the Sun Clan Relic
notes: More likely to be found in Bone Pits anyway

objectives.text: Find and loot the Shrine of Bones
Find and kill the zone boss and loot the horn
Kill hyena enemies until you find the Sun Clan Relic
Portal back to town
Talk to Zarka
Use desert map to go to the Valley of Titans
Find and click the three ancient seals
Find the medallion and place the two relics (permanent buff choice)
notes: Waypoint is here. Choose a buff — can be changed later.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Titan Grotto
Go to the Titan Grotto
Find and kill the boss, then go back to town
Talk to Zarka, then Asala
Use the desert map to travel to Traitor's Passage
Go to the front of the caravan and sound the horn
Use the desert map to travel to Deshar
Talk to the abandoned rhoa BECAUSE IT'S THE RIGHT THING TO DO YOU MONSTER.
Find the final letter on a corpse on the ground
notes: Near a big tower on the ground

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Path of Mourning
notes: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Deshar

objectives.text: Go to the Path of Mourning
Find the exit to the Spires of Deshar
Find the Sisters of Garukhan
Find and kill Tor Gul, the Defiler
Portal back to town
Turn in the final letter at Shambrin
Talk to everyone, then use desert map to go to the Dreadnought
Find the exit to the Dreadnought Vanguard, then find and kill Jamara, the Abomination
Portal back to town
Leave the Caravan, talk to the Hooded One, go back to the Caravan
Talk to Asala to go to Act 3
